about.bio: I am a dedicated Web Developer and AI Automation Specialist. I specialize in designing intelligent workflows with n8n, crafting fully customized WordPress websites (including theme and plugin development), and building highly interactive, responsive user interfaces using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React JS. My mission is to bridge creative web development with intelligent automation.

highlightCards.title: AI Automation
highlightCards.desc: Designing autonomous agentic workflows and multi-tool pipelines with n8n to streamline operations.

highlightCards.title: WordPress Dev
highlightCards.desc: Building robust websites from scratch, customizing premium themes, and writing modular custom plugins.

highlightCards.title: React JS & JS
highlightCards.desc: Developing ultra-fast, rich single page applications using React, modern JavaScript, and Tailwind CSS.

highlightCards.title: HTML / CSS / JS
highlightCards.desc: Writing clean, standard-compliant, search-engine-optimized, and super fluid frontend layouts.

projects.title: n8n AI Lead Generator & Agent Workflow
projects.desc: An automated n8n workflow that monitors user submissions, qualifies leads with context using AI, and automatically syncs them to WordPress & active CRM platforms.

projects.title: Custom WordPress Theme & Plugin for LMS
projects.desc: A custom WordPress theme built from scratch with an accompanying custom plugin managing courses and subscriptions securely.

projects.title: Responsive React Portfolio with Tailwind
projects.desc: A super fast single-page app containing beautiful micro-animations, customizable dark elements, and complete responsiveness.

projects.title: WooCommerce Sync Agent Plugin
projects.desc: A heavy-duty custom PHP plugin for WooCommerce that communicates directly with external supplier APIs to keep stock volumes and item categories updated automatically.

projects.title: Interactive Client Billing & Booking Hub
projects.desc: A custom client accounting dashboard constructed in React, permitting secure credit card payment flow via stripe webhooks and instant appointment management.

projects.title: Lead Scraper & Auto-Drafting Automation
projects.desc: A multi-node n8n workflow designed to scrape high-potential target lists, score leads based on text heuristics, and draft contextual responses via Gemini API integration.

projects.title: Responsive Minimalist Agency UI Kit
projects.desc: Sleek, lightweight, pixel-perfect layout framework written in semantic HTML5 and vanilla JS. Implements gorgeous scroll-bound transitions and lazy resource loaders.

faq.question: Which workflow automations do you model with n8n?
faq.answer: I create triggers, response filters, database auto-sync systems (WordPress/Sheets), and AI agent workflows using n8n for fully responsive task management.

faq.question: Can you code WordPress plugins and themes from absolute scratch?
faq.answer: Yes. Beyond customizing templates, I build standards-compliant WordPress themes and custom modular plug-ins to implement your custom workflows cleanly.

faq.question: What frameworks are used for web sites?
faq.answer: I utilize clean, native HTML/CSS/JS alongside React JS, Tailwind CSS, and Vite to build blazing-fast responsive applications.

services.title: n8n AI Agent Automation
services.desc: Intelligent automated pipelines and multi-tool workflows built on n8n. Integrate ChatGPT/Gemini, auto-handle incoming leads, synchronize spreadsheets, and optimize manual tasks.
features: Advanced n8n workflow triggers and loops
AI Agent tool definitions & custom function calls
Real-time event logging & automated error recovery

services.title: WordPress Website Development
services.desc: Robust, lightweight, SEO-ready WordPress websites tailored to your unique agency presence or ecommerce workflows using standard PHP & modular layouts.
features: Full-site creation with clean PHP codebase

services.title: Theme & Plugin Customization
services.desc: Customized development adjusting layout rules on premium WordPress themes or writing custom plugins from scratch to implement features standard systems miss.
features: Custom WP plugin programming from scratch
API hooks integration to third-party databases

services.title: React JS Applications
services.desc: Ultra-fast, responsive Single Page Applications (SPAs) fueled by modern React Hooks, local states, smooth motion animations, and robust modular structures.
features: Tailwind CSS styling and fluid user UX

services.title: HTML, CSS, JS Frontend Layouts
services.desc: Sleek, lightweight, pixel-perfect user interfaces built with pure HTML5, CSS3, and native JavaScript. Complete cross-browser compatibility and outstanding responsiveness.
features: Fluid grid systems without framework weight

services.title: Bespoke API & DB Integrations
services.desc: Connecting external third-party tools, calendars, or payment webhooks safely to standard databases and CRM storage portals with complete data sanitization.
features: Structured validation and error catch routines

services.title: Core Performance Audits & SEO
services.desc: Deep diagnostic analysis of loading states, network resource sizes, and SEO headers to ensure your services reach ideal speeds and rank highly of Google searches.
features: Bundle chunk split and image compression
